reasoning: The "Coalition of the Willing" reassurance force is explicitly intended as a post-war deployment, conditional upon a peace agreement or ceasefire being finalized. Given that we are now past the knowledge cutoff in November 2025 with no peace deal in place and fighting ongoing, it is practically impossible for the 26-nation coalition to politically finalize, coordinate, and physically deploy a large multinational military force into Ukraine before December 31, 2025.
